we are supposed to have some kind of stats or status command but I don't see it wired up
Connected the existing `index_stats` function to the CLI by adding a `Stats` variant to the `Commands` enum and a match arm in `main()`.
Fixed the "no such module: vec0" error by making `ensure_vec_extension()` public and calling it before the connection in the Stats handler.
Confirmed `stats` command works and returns file/chunk counts.
is the product complete or it has gaps?

Identified it as a working v0.1 with core RAG loop functional, but noted gaps: thin stats command, missing OpenRouter embeddings and local LLM for generate, minimal tests, reranker scores discarded, and destructive error on dimension mismatch.
add embed on openrouter and test that it works
Implemented OpenRouter embedding support in `src/embed.rs` using reqwest, and confirmed both local and OpenRouter embedding paths work end-to-end.
Asked whether the user wants the config file switched to OpenRouter embeddings or the code's configuration handling updated.
Updated config to use OpenRouter embeddings with text-embedding-3-small, rebuilt the index, and confirmed query works.
what is "onnx/model.onnx [00:00:07]"? when I try to use generate it downloads that thing
Explained it's the BGE reranker ONNX model downloaded by fastembed on first use for reranking in `generate`, and offered to add a `--no-rerank` flag to skip it.
